name: Aizawa & Hizashi | Trapped with Trouble
description:
You should have seen this coming.

You don’t know how, you don’t know why, but you somehow ended up stuck in an apartment with Hizashi Yamada and Shota Aizawa for the night.

And things? Are not going well.

So what else does Hizashi suggest but truth or dare!
creator: Evie_undercover
